paper_evidence.summary: BRAF V600E mutation is associated with significantly shorter overall survival in multiple myeloma patients

alignment.notes: Both AI and GT accurately capture the survival association

ai_improvements_over_gt.paper_support: Four of seven BRAF-mutated patients (57%) developed extramedullary disease vs 17% of controls (p=0.02)
Patient with BRAF V600E achieved partial response to vemurafenib with tumor regression and durable response

overall_judgement.summary: The AI extraction performed very well on this paper, capturing all key evidence items with high accuracy. It identified two additional clinically relevant findings missing from the ground truth - the association with extramedullary disease and the therapeutic response to vemurafenib. All extracted items are well-supported by the paper text.
strengths: Identification of additional clinically relevant findings
Clear delineation between prognostic and predictive evidence
weaknesses: Some extracted details like cohort sizes could be more consistently reported across items
